title: Analytics - Support App Opened
scenario: Analytics event logged when Support > App screen is opened, tracking event metrics with delayed count updates
steps: Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
Tap on the Support option (or navigate to Support via the menu).
Tap on the App screen within the Support section.
Observe the analytics event being logged.
Check the event metrics: event count, events in the last 30 minutes, event count by country/gender, events per session, app version, app build, and app environment.
Wait a few hours and check if the event counts update.
expected: Analytics event is logged immediately when the Support > App screen is opened, and all metrics (event count, events in last 30 minutes, event count by country/gender, events per session, app version, app build, app environment) are displayed and updated in real-time or near real-time.
